prompt: Take this screenshot from a modern, realistic video game and reimagine it as a 16-bit pixel art scene from a classic SNES RPG.
prompt_refined: Generate a 16-bit pixel art scene, characteristic of a classic SNES RPG, by transforming the visual elements from image 1. The central focus should be the large wooden building with a thatched roof, rendered in an isometric or top-down isometric perspective consistent with image 1. Include the surrounding landscape: rocky cliffs rising on the right and in the background, sandy ground, and several small palm trees. A body of water, resembling a river or coastline, should be on the left side of the scene. Ensure the 16-bit pixel art style accurately captures the details, color palette, and overall aesthetic of classic SNES games. All modern game user interface elements visible in image 1 must be omitted from the generated scene.
objects: Large wooden building with a thatched roof
Rocky cliffs (on the right and in the background)
Body of water (on the left side, resembling a river or coastline)
Modern game user interface elements (should not be present)
